$comment: Single source of external skill/subagent dependencies the vibe flow assumes. Consumed by doctor.sh (presence + degrade report) and rendered into the docs dependency table. Keep required_by coarse (family globs), not per-phase, to avoid drift.

deps.name: superpowers
deps.degrade: flow phases self-execute from their constraint documents; never a hard failure

deps.name: feature-dev
deps.source: Claude Code plugin: feature-dev (code-explorer, code-architect, code-reviewer)
deps.degrade: the orchestrator performs the explore / architect / review step inline

deps.name: caveman
deps.degrade: check-skills.sh prints the caveman level definition inline (output compression only)
